title: bryophyllum × rechingeri
intro: Bryophyllum × rechingeri, also known as Kalanchoe thyrsiflora × Bryophyllum pinnatum, is a hybrid succulent plant that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Bryophyllum × rechingeri is often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, and is also used in traditional remedies for skin conditions and wounds.
